series_metadata.series_title: Federal Census Research and Reference Documentation
series_metadata.series_description: Census data and reports obtained from the United States Census Bureau used by county boards of elections in reconfiguring precinct boundaries and by the Secretary of State in issuing proclamations under R.C. 703.06, and related correspondence, including the proclamations issued by the Secretary of State.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until receipt of the census data and reports for the next succeeding federal census, then may destroy. ; Electronic: A copy of the Excel spreadsheet containing the census data to be transferred to State Archives. After transfer, retain until receipt of the census data and reports for the next succeeding federal census, then may destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Archives
